title: fagraea oreophila
intro: Fagraea oreophila, also known as the mountain frangipani or mountain gardenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Fagraea oreophila include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
